title: Browser Link Clicked Event Payload
description: Schema for the payload of browser.link_clicked events tracking link navigation

sourceHost.description: Hostname of the page where the link was clicked

sourcePathHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source URL path

targetPathHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the target URL path

cssSelectorHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the CSS selector for the clicked element

elementTag.description: HTML tag of the clicked element (e.g., a, button)

elementId.description: ID attribute of the clicked element if present

elementClassesHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the element's class list

isExternal.description: Whether the link navigates to a different domain

isNewTab.description: Whether the link opened in a new tab

x.description: X coordinate of the click relative to viewport

y.description: Y coordinate of the click relative to viewport

viewportWidth.description: Width of the viewport at click time

viewportHeight.description: Height of the viewport at click time

linkPosition.description: Position data for the click event

modifierKeys.description: Modifier keys pressed during the click

dwellBeforeClickMs.description: Time on page before the click in milliseconds

incognito.description: Whether the page was viewed in incognito/private mode
